---
---

## Slide 1 - OJS cell output

```{ojs}
md`**hello** from observable`
```

## Slide 2 - Multiple OJS cells

```{ojs}
1 + 1
```

```{ojs}
2 + 2
```

## Slide 3 - OJS alongside plain code block

```python
not_executed = True
```

```{ojs}
"observable runs"
```

## Slide 4 - echo true (source + output visible)

```{ojs}
//| echo: true
3 + 3
```
